DA rate scales linearly 5% (full HP) -> 35% (1 HP) by missing HP: 30%*((maxhp-curhp)/maxhp)+5%. value=floor, total_cap=ceiling. Validated by Tatjenen HP sweep.
TA rate scales linearly 5% (full HP) -> 35% (1 HP) by missing HP; same curve as DA. Validated by Tatjenen HP sweep.

DEF = maxHP x 0.025% (cap 25%/copy).
Sp. DMG Cap = maxHP x 0.01% (cap 7%/copy, 20% total).
